sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42418" key="e)ri/glhnos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐρί-γληνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n42418.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with large eye-balls, full-eyed,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:310" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.310</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
